name: abelian
description: Adversarial collaboration framework (Kahneman-style applied to LLM dispatch) for deep, innovative, long-horizon iteration with tractable doc and testable metric. ONE skill, ONE loop, ONE discipline: every configured peer (default 2) proposes AND attacks every other peer's proposals; mutual inspiration; mechanism-converge termination. 18 INVARIANTS rules harden against fabrication, drift, compaction, mission drift, cross-layer evidence confusion, fuzzy-program-contract, fuzzy-mission, and propose/counter discipline asymmetry. Rule #18: peer must be innovative + grounded when proposing, strictly verification-oriented when countering attacks. Two input forms: `abelian program.md` (sharp contract) or `abelian --mission "<text>"` (fuzzy mission, triggers goal-authoring stage). Everything else (peer pair, search shape, code-review supplemental) declared in program.md sections — no CLI flag soup.
